title: UK Export Finance Country Heads and London Team - Middle East
body: "Team Middle East (London Office)  Interim Co-Head of Origination   Alexander Milne      Email alexander.milne@ukexportfinance.gov.uk         Regional Head   Joseph Chakra      Email joseph.chakra@ukexportfinance.gov.uk         Senior Business Origination Officer)    Chris Allum      Email chris.allum@ukexportfinance.gov.uk         Business Origination Officer   Yasmine Siddiqi     Email Yasmine.siddiqi@ukexportfinance.gov.uk         Country Heads (By Region)  UAE and Kuwait   Graham Scopes    Based at the British Embassy DubaiAl Seef Road Bur Dubai Near to Dubai CreeksidePO Box 65  DubaiUnited Arab Emirates     Email graham.scopes@fcdo.gov.uk         Saudi Arabia, Bahrain and Jordan   Michelle Leong   Based at the British Embassy RiyadhBritish Embassy Diplomatic Quarter,  11693 Riyadh Saudi Arabia PO Box 9435 RiyadhSaudi Arabia     Email michelle.leong@fcdo.gov.uk         Qatar, Oman and Iraq   Daniel Rathwell   Based at the British Embassy DohaWest Bay Dafna Area, Onaiza Zone  66, Al Shabab StreetPO Box 3  DohaQatar     Email daniel.rathwell@fcdo.gov.uk        "
